name: Create Express application (api/app.js)
description: Create api/app.js which exports an Express application and implements the GET /hello route to return a JSON object: { "message": "Hello, World!" }.
verify: node -e "const app = require('./api/app.js'); if (typeof app.get !== 'function') throw new Error('Not an Express app');"

name: Create Jest unit test (api/app.test.js)
description: Create api/app.test.js that imports the application from app.js, uses supertest to call GET /hello, and asserts that status is 200 and the body has message 'Hello, World!'.

name: Create server entry point (api/index.js)
description: Create api/index.js that imports the Express app from app.js and starts a server on port 3000, exporting the server instance so it can be verified.
verify: node -e "const server = require('./api/index.js'); setTimeout(() => { server.close(); process.exit(0); }, 500);"
